## Analysts frame SpaceX as an AI infrastructure play via Starlink compute capacity

If the AI-infrastructure framing for SPCX gains analyst consensus, it widens the investor base and could re-rate the multiple beyond space-economy comps; thesis validation requires evidence that Starlink capacity is meaningfully consumed by AI workloads.

- At least one analyst piece argues SpaceX and Starlink are direct participants in the AI infrastructure buildout
- The connection drawn is between Starlink's compute or connectivity capacity and AI workload demands
- Frames SPCX as addressable by AI-capex-focused investors, not only space-economy investors
- Claim is analyst framing, not confirmed company disclosure; specific capacity figures absent
